name: Yaria

skills.name: Deer Spirit
skills.description: When inflicted with crowd control effects (excluding suppression), gains immunity to all effects.

skills.name: Wandering Beam
skills.description: Releases a spirit in the target direction, which tracks nearby enemies after reaching its max range.The spirit launches and deals damage to enemies hit. In deer spirit form, using this skill will restore her to Human Form.

skills.name: Accelerating Blitz
skills.description: Deals continuous damage to nearby enemies. Attached: Increases casting range.

skills.name: Verdant Protector
skills.description: Attaches herself to a teammate, providing a true damage shield and enhancing your skill effects. Attached: When the shield is exhausted, the attachment will end and enter cooldown. Actively detaching reduces the cooldown of this skill.

tips: Yaria is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.0% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Crimson Shadow → Boots of Tranquility → Frozen Breath → Ominous Premonition → Succubus Cloak → Overlord's Platemail.
Run Fate for stats that match Yaria's Support kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Wandering Beam → Accelerating Blitz → Verdant Protector → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Yaria excels into Dian Wei, Dun, Mayene. Avoid blind picking into Dolia, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

Yaria is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.3% — expect Yaria to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Yaria good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Yaria is Tier S Support with 48.0% win rate, 1.1% pick rate, and 1.3% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Yaria build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Crimson Shadow, Boots of Tranquility, Frozen Breath, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Overlord's Platemail. Run Fate arcana with Flash & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Yaria?
faqs.answer: Pick Dolia, Wukong, Musashi into Yaria. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Yaria completes core items. Yaria struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Yaria counter?
faqs.answer: Yaria is strong into Dian Wei, Dun, Mayene according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Yaria when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Yaria good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Yaria is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.3% — expect Yaria to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Yaria play?
faqs.answer: Yaria is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Yaria?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Flash & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Yaria or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Yaria vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Yaria has +2.0% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Yaria when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Yaria?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 1.3% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Support.
